summary: Voice-clone-only neural TTS based on F5-TTS_v1_Base. ~1.5 GB model, English + Chinese, requires a 6-15s reference clip.
author: Subtitld add-on team

fields.label: Default voice reference (6-15 s, mono WAV recommended)
fields.help: Required by F5-TTS. Per-speaker overrides set in the speaker panel take precedence.

fields.label: Reference clip transcript
fields.help: Optional. If empty, F5-TTS auto-transcribes via Whisper (slower first call).

fields.label: Skip auto-extracted reference transcript
fields.help: When the dubbing UI extracts a reference clip from the project audio, it normally also forwards the matching subtitle text. Enable this to suppress the transcript — F5-TTS will fall back to Whisper auto-transcription (slower first call, cached afterwards). Useful when the subtitle text paraphrases rather than transcribes verbatim.
